title: ficus peruviana
intro: Ficus peruviana, also known as the Indian banyan or banyan fig, is a species of fig tree native to the tropical regions of the world. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Ficus peruviana has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off pathogens. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
